Package actrie

Class AhoCorasickTrie<nodeType extends ACTrieNode>

java.lang.Object
actrie.AhoCorasickTrie<nodeType>
Type Parameters:
nodeType - nodeType is a subclass of ACTrieNode. It ensures typing works as expected.
public class AhoCorasickTrie<nodeType extends ACTrieNode>
extends java.lang.Object
Represents and builds an AhoCorasickTrie. This class takes a set of keywords, a LanguageParameter and a NodeFactory and then builds the Trie + the DFA.
It is built to make extension easy: We can inject different node factories and then build algorithms on the exposed list of trie nodes.

The implementation is based on the original paper: https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/360825.360855

Since:
26.12.2020, Sa.
Author:
Markus Walder
